posts.name: Jay Brunker
posts.cooked:
Just asking for suggestions, but if you were starting out with the Vidiot …
what would be your next choice for a LZX module?

*thanks in advance.

posts.name: Respirator
posts.cooked:
staircase, pendulum, arch are my favorites that don’t require sync and are on the cheaper side

if you end up getting a couple of those and are still enjoying video synthesis

start considering what kind of things you want to make

that should inform your module purchases

posts.name: Jay Brunker
posts.cooked: I really appreciate the speedy response here, and from everyone that has replied to my various posts. Good advice. I’ve been interested in video synthesis for quite a while, but have just recently decided to dip my toes in the water. Got a Vidiot on order, so am looking around for ways to supplement it. Thanks!

posts.name: Respirator
posts.cooked:
in these two videos the vidiot is getting combined with the larger system
there are more of these kind of videos on my account there

the vidiot is a great starting point but has gotten so much more integral now that I finally got it setup like I want

sync coming out of the vessel case into the composite in on the vidiot then I can use visual cortex as the “sync master” and just patch in and out of the vidiot with RCA or 1/8 outputs

posts.name: Bill Wiatroski
posts.cooked: I’ve recently grabbed my Vidiot and begun to really put some time in with it again. CURTAIN! My current recommendation is Pendulum + Curtain. Curtain can really add some subtleties and depth, especially when patched into the LumaProc CVs…

posts.name: joseph demeter
posts.cooked: any of the DIY lzx modules you would recommend for adding to the vidiot?

posts.name: Respirator
posts.cooked:
the closest to DIY modules that I have are the sandin IP function generator and differentiator

function generator in combination with the luma processor of the vidiot is just golden

the differentiator is good fun too but I haven’t used it specifically with the vidiot just yet I don’t think

posts.name: Chad @ LZX Industries
posts.cooked: This video series might not make the choice any easier. Vidiot plus ANYTHING is pretty fun.

vidiot + fader if you have some external audio eurorack modules.
It will allow you to have more control on your vidiot.

Vidiot + curtain is my favorite pick. Then the pendulum, and then the staircase.

Hey there, I picked up a bridge after I got a vidiot so it could talk to my circuit bent video mixers but I’m real curious as to what direction you decided to branch out in. I seem to be in a similar location and want to build upon the video synthesis aspects of my videos. I was looking at Pendulum or Staircase but I haven’t been able to decide.
For me it was the diver module,after that i’ve added a curtain and that’s it so far.
